\begin{pcvstack}[boxed]
    \procedure[linenumbering]{Starting game}{ %:tags: G0
    \procedure[linenumbering]{Game 1}{ %:tags: G1
    \procedure[linenumbering]{Game 2}{ %:tags: G2
    \procedure[linenumbering]{Reduction $\bdv_1$}{ %:tags: Red1
        (\pk, \sk) \getsr \KEM.\keygen() \\
        (\ct^*, \key_A) \getsr \KEM.\encaps(\pk) \\ %:tags: G0
        (\ct^*, \key_A^*) \getsr \KEM.\encaps(\pk) \\ %:tags: G1,Red1
        (\ct^*, \_\_) \getsr \KEM.\encaps(\pk) \\ %:tags: G2
        \key \gets F(\key_A) \\ %:tags: G0,G1,Red1
        \key \getsr F.\kemkeyspace \\ %:tags: G2
        \pcreturn \adv^{\oracle}(\pk, \ct^*, \key)
    }
    \procedure[linenumbering]{$\oracle(\ct)$}{
        \pcif \ct = \ct^* \pcthen \\
        \pcind \pcreturn \bot \\
        \key_A \gets \KEM.\decaps(\sk, \ct) \\ %:tags: G0,G1,G2
        \key_A \gets \oracle[Okem](\ct) \\ %:tags: Red1
        \pcreturn F(\key_A)
    }
\end{pcvstack}
